rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION, ITS VS. TERESA GRIFFITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011, line 1. Plaintiff Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation, its assignees and/or successors Motion for reconsideration. Deny. Fails to meet 1008a New facts and/or law. Moving party failed to file opposition to newly filed motion. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ANTHONY K. HENRY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011, line 5. Plaintiff Deutsche Bank National Trust Company's Motion for Summary Judgment. Deny. Triable issue of Fact Re Notice to Mr. Henry. See Henry Declaration. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE VS. SHEILA VINSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011, line 2. Defendant Sheila Vinson's demurrer to first Amended Complaint. Off calendar settled. This was a settled protective date. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATHY ERICKSON VS. JENNIFER GEARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion To Admit Requests For Admissions, To Compel Responses To Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011, line 3. Plaintiff Kathy Erickson's Motion to admit requests for admissions, to compel responses to interrogatories. Grant (Subject to Opposition) Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery and Request for Admissions and $937.50 attorney fees and costs. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 540 LEAVENWORTH, LLC VS. KYA DERRY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011, line 4. Defendant Kya Derry's Demurrer to Complaint. Overruled. 5 days to answer. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)
